description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mediamoose/toolbox:1.15 Docker image with stages lint, test, report, and release. Add a python_lint job in the lint stage that strips volumes from docker-compose.yml, builds and runs flake8, isort, and black containers via docker-compose, copies the source into each container, starts them, and runs the linters, tagging the job with docker. Define a hidden .test-run template that removes volumes, builds a python container with build args PYTHON_VERSION and PIP_DJANGO, copies the code in, starts it to generate coverage, copies out the coverage directory as a one‑day artifact, and cleans up the container in after_script; then create matrix test jobs named “3.6 dj-1.11”, “3.6 dj-2.0”, …, “3.8 dj-latest” that extend .test-run and set the appropriate PYTHON_VERSION and PIP_DJANGO variables. Add a coverage report job in the report stage that pulls and runs a report container, copies out the coverage report, defines a coverage regex, and removes the container after execution. Finally, add a hidden .release template that substitutes {VERSION} in setup.py with the tag or job ID, builds a source distribution with python setup.py sdist, and uploads it via twine, then create a pypi.org release job that extends .release, runs only on tags (manual when PRODUCTION_AUTO_RELEASE is false) using TWINE_USERNAME and TWINE_PASSWORD secrets to publish to PyPI, and a test.pypi.org job that also extends .release, runs on any branch, and uploads to the Test PyPI repository using test credentials.
